stories.title: Live updates: Mexico double lead after header from...
Ruggs denied parole nearly five years after crash
stories.summary: Ex-NFL player Henry Ruggs was denied parole nearly five years after killing a woman in a car crash in Las Vegas, the Nevada Board of Parole Commissioners ruled Thursday.

stories.title: Knicks fans target Wemby with egg, jeers at hotel
stories.summary: A brutal night for the Spurs' Victor Wembanyama continued after he returned to his hotel, as he was pelted with boos from Knicks fans and nearly hit by a flying egg.

stories.title: AG warns Big 12 if TTU punished for Sorsby case
stories.summary: Texas AG Ken Paxton sent a letter to Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark and board of directors chairman Douglas Girod, notifying the league it would be exposed to "substantial liability" if it takes action against Texas Tech for playing Brendan Sorsby.

stories.title: Chapman: If Yanks want me, GM should apologize
stories.summary: If the Yankees were to acquire Red Sox closer Aroldis Chapman, he would like New York GM Brian Cashman to apologize to him for how his previous stint with the team ended.
